enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Some of the All India Financial Institutions (AIFIs) may also be involved in implementation
of various forms of Debt Relief Schemes (DRS) announced by State Governments that
inter alia entail sacrifice / waiver of debt obligations of a targeted segment of borrowers,
against fiscal support.
enriched_requirements.object: implementation of various forms of Debt Relief Schemes (DRS) announced by State Governments that inter alia entail sacrifice / wai

conditions: If such schemes are announced frequently
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If such schemes are announced frequently, incommensurately, or
without due consideration to the principles of financial discipline, they would negatively
affect credit discipline and in the long run, may be counter-productive to the credit flow to
such borrowers.
enriched_requirements.object: credit flow to such borrowers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial
Institutions - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect unless specified
otherwise.
enriched_requirements.object: immediate effect unless specified otherwise

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to All India Financial Institutions (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'AIFIs' and individually as an 'AIFI'), viz., Export-Import
Bank of India (EXIM Bank), National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development
(NABARD), National Housing Bank (NHB), Small Industries Development Bank of
India (SIDBI), and National Bank for Financing Infrastructure and Development
(NaBFID).
enriched_requirements.object: India Financial Institutions (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'AIFIs' and individually as an 'AIFI'), viz

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In these Directions, the following definitions shall apply, unless the context otherwise
requires:
(1) 'aggregate exposure' shall include all fund based and non-fund based
exposure, including investment exposure;

(2) 'compromise settlement' shall refer to any negotiated arrangement with the
borrower to fully settle the claims of an AIFI against the borrower in cash.
enriched_requirements.object: arrangement with the borrower to fully settle the claims of an AIFI against the borrower in cash

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: Compromise settlement may entail some sacrifice of the
amount due from the borrower on the part of the AIFI with corresponding
waiver of claims of the AIFI against the borrower to that extent.
enriched_requirements.object: the amount due from the borrower on the part of the AIFI with corresponding waiver of claims of the AIFI against the borrower

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) 'credit event' in the context of projects under implementation shall be
deemed to have been triggered on the occurrence of any of the following:
Explanation: Only equity and instruments compulsorily convertible into
equity (without any embedded optionality) shall be exempt from determining
outstanding principal debt.
enriched_requirements.object: been triggered on the occurrence of any of the following: Explanation: Only equity and instruments compulsorily convertible into equ
principal debt envisaged to be held by all the specified lenders as per the proposed resolution plan

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(13) 'review period' shall mean a period of 30 days from the date of default or a
credit event, as the case may be;
enriched_requirements.object: 30 days from the date of default or a credit event, as the case may be
entity is not in default with any specified lender at any point of time during the period concerned

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (15) 'specified lender' shall mean any of the following entities:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall put in place Board-approved policies for resolution of stressed assets,
including the timelines for resolution as well as detailed policies on various signs of
financial difficulty, providing quantitative as well as qualitative parameters, for
determining financial difficulty.
enriched_requirements.object: policies for resolution of stressed assets, including the timelines for resolution as well as detailed policies on various

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A non-exhaustive indicative list of signs of financial difficulty, which is based on the
Basel Committee Guidelines on 'Prudential treatment of problem assets - definitions
of non-performing exposures and forbearance', is provided as under for reference:
(1) A default, as per the definition provided in the framework, shall be treated
as an indicator for financial difficulty, irrespective of reasons for the default.
enriched_requirements.object: indicator for financial difficulty, irrespective of reasons for the default

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall complement the above list of non-exhaustive enumeration of financial
difficulty indicators with key financial ratios and operational parameters which may
include quantitative and qualitative aspects.
enriched_requirements.object: of non-exhaustive enumeration of financial difficulty indicators with key financial ratios and operational parameters which

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: Financial difficulty may be identified even in the absence of arrears on
an exposure.
enriched_requirements.object: the absence of arrears on an exposure

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall put in place Board-approved policies for undertaking compromise
settlements with the borrowers as well as for technical write-offs, which shall inter
alia include the following:
(1) comprehensive prescription of the process to be followed for all compromise
settlements and technical write-offs, with specific guidance on the
necessary conditions precedent such as minimum ageing, deterioration in
collateral value etc.;
enriched_requirements.object: policies for undertaking compromise settlements with the borrowers as well as for technical write-offs, which shall inter

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) graded framework for examination of staff accountability in such cases with
reasonable thresholds and timelines as may be decided by the Board;
enriched_requirements.object: Board

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) delegation of power for such approvals rests with an authority
(individual or committee, as the case may be) which is at least one
<image>
level higher in hierarchy than the authority vested with power to
sanction the credit / investment exposure.
enriched_requirements.object: least one <image> level higher in hierarchy than the authority vested with power to sanction the credit / investment exposure

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that any official who was part of sanctioning the loan (as
individual or part of a committee) shall not be part of the approving
the proposal for compromise settlement of the same loan account,
in any capacity.
enriched_requirements.object: approving the proposal for compromise settlement of the same loan account, in any capacity

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) proposals for compromise settlements in respect of borrowers
classified as fraud or wilful defaulter, as permitted in terms of
paragraphs 83 to 98, shall require approval of the Board in all cases.
enriched_requirements.object: Board in all cases

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall put in place Board approved policy for permitting payment in
instalments of the crystallized Mark to Market (MTM) value of partially or fully
terminated derivative contracts in terms of paragraphs 42 and 43.
enriched_requirements.object: approved policy for permitting payment in instalments of the crystallized Mark to Market (MTM) value of partially or fully terminat

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The board approved policy of the AIFI shall incorporate provisions for resolution
as provided for under Chapter VI-A of these Directions, including the following:
(1) the objective principles for the terms of relief to be granted to various borrower
/ loan categories.
enriched_requirements.object: as provided for under Chapter VI-A of these Directions, including the following: (1) the objective principles fo

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall recognise incipient stress in loan accounts, immediately on default, by
classifying such assets as special mention accounts (SMA) as per the following
categories:
Basis for classification - Principal or interest payment or any other amount wholly or partly
SMA Sub-categories
overdue
SMA-0 Up to 30 days
SMA-1 More than 30 days and up to 60 days

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall report credit information, including classification of an account as SMA,
to Central Repository of Information on Large Credits (CRILC), on all borrowers
having aggregate exposure of ₹5 crore and above with them, on a monthly basis.
enriched_requirements.object: classification of an account as SMA, to Central Repository of Information on Large Credits (CRILC), on all borrow

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall submit a weekly report of instances of default by all borrowers (with
aggregate exposure of ₹5 crore and above) by close of business on every Friday,
or the preceding working day if Friday happens to be a holiday.
enriched_requirements.object: of instances of default by all borrowers (with aggregate exposure of ₹5 crore and above) by close of business on every Friday,

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall adhere to the relevant provisions on submission of financial information
to information utilities of Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016 and Insolvency and
Bankruptcy Board of India (Information Utilities) Regulations, 2017 and put in place
appropriate systems and procedures to ensure compliance to the provisions of the
Code and Regulations.
enriched_requirements.object: provisions on submission of financial information to information utilities of Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016 and Insolven

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall make suitable disclosures in its financial statements in the 'Notes to
Accounts', as specified in the Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions
- Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: its financial statements in the 'Notes to Accounts', as specified in the Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Insti

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Once a borrower is reported to be in default by any of the specified lenders other
than a NBFC, the specified lenders shall jointly undertake a prima facie review of
the borrower account within the Review Period.
enriched_requirements.object: facie review of the borrower account within the Review Period

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
During this Review Period, the specified lenders shall jointly decide on the resolution
strategy, including the nature of the resolution plan, the approach for implementation
of the resolution plan, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: resolution strategy, including the nature of the resolution plan, the approach for implementation of the resolution plan, etc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: An AIFI may also choose to initiate legal proceedings for insolvency or recovery.
enriched_requirements.object: legal proceedings for insolvency or recovery

conditions: where resolution plan is to be implemented
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In cases where resolution plan is to be implemented, all specified lenders, shall enter
into an inter-creditor agreement, during the Review Period, to provide for ground
rules for finalisation and implementation of the resolution plan in respect of
borrowers with credit facilities from more than one specified lender.
enriched_requirements.object: agreement, during the Review Period, to provide for ground rules for finalisation and implementation of the resolution pl

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The inter-creditor agreement shall provide that:
(1) any decision agreed by signatories representing 75 per cent by value of total
outstanding credit facilities (fund based as well non-fund based) and 60 per
cent of signatories by number shall be binding upon all the signatories;
enriched_requirements.object: decision agreed by signatories representing 75 per cent by value of total outstanding credit facilities (fund based as well non-

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and
(2) resolution plans shall provide for payment not less than the liquidation value
due to the dissenting signatories.
enriched_requirements.object: less than the liquidation value due to the dissenting signatories

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In addition to the requirements in paragraph 25, the inter-creditor agreement shall,
inter alia, provide for rights and duties of majority signatories, duties and protection
<image>
of rights of dissenting signatories, treatment of signatories with priority in cash flows
/ differential security interest, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: for rights and duties of majority signatories, duties and protection <image> of rights of dissenting signatories, treatment of s

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A resolution plan may involve any action / plan / reorganization including, but not
limited to, regularisation of the account by payment of all over dues by the borrower
entity, sale of the exposures to other entities / investors, change in ownership and
restructuring.
enriched_requirements.object: plan / reorganization including, but not limited to, regularisation of the account by payment of all over dues by the borrower en

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The resolution plan shall be clearly documented by the AIFI (even if there is no
change in any terms and conditions).
enriched_requirements.object: the AIFI (even if there is no change in any terms and conditions)

conditions: where the aggregate exposure of specified lenders is ₹100 crore and above
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A resolution plan involving restructuring / change in ownership in respect of accounts
where the aggregate exposure of specified lenders is ₹100 crore and above, shall
require independent credit evaluation of the residual debt by credit rating agencies
specifically authorised by the Reserve Bank for this purpose.
enriched_requirements.object: of the residual debt by credit rating agencies specifically authorised by the Reserve Bank for this purpose

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
While accounts with aggregate exposure of ₹500 crore and above shall require two
such independent credit evaluations, others shall require one independent credit
evaluation.
enriched_requirements.object: credit evaluations, others shall require one independent credit evaluation

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Only such resolution plans which receive a credit opinion of RP4 or better for the
residual debt from one or two credit rating agencies, as the case may be, shall be
considered for implementation.

conditions:
If independent credit evaluation is obtained from more than the required number of
credit rating agencies
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If independent credit evaluation is obtained from more than the required number of
credit rating agencies, all such independent credit evaluation opinions shall be RP4
or better for the resolution plan to be considered for implementation.
enriched_requirements.object: for the resolution plan to be considered for implementation

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The credit rating agencies shall be directly engaged by the specified lenders for the
purpose of independent credit evaluation and the payment of fee for such
assignments shall be made by the specified lenders.
enriched_requirements.object: the specified lenders for the purpose of independent credit evaluation and the payment of fee for such assignments shall be mad

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The process of re-classification of an
asset should not stop merely because RP is under consideration.
enriched_requirements.object: is under consideration

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A resolution plan in respect of borrowers to whom one or more specified lenders
continue to have credit exposure, shall be deemed to be 'implemented' only if the
following conditions are met:
(1) A resolution plan which does not involve restructuring / change in ownership
shall be deemed to be implemented only if the borrower is not in default with
any of the specified lenders as on 180th day from the end of the Review
Period.
enriched_requirements.object: 'implemented' only if the following conditions are met: (1) A resolution plan which does not involve restructuring / change in ownersh

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Any subsequent default after the 180-day period shall be treated as
a fresh default, triggering a fresh review.
enriched_requirements.object: fresh default, triggering a fresh review

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) A resolution plan which involves restructuring / change in ownership shall
be deemed to be implemented only if all of the following conditions are met:
<image>
enriched_requirements.object: implemented only if all of the following conditions are met: <image>

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A resolution plan which involves specified lenders exiting the exposure by assigning
the exposures to third party or a resolution plan involving recovery action shall be
deemed to be implemented only if the exposure to the borrower is fully extinguished.
enriched_requirements.object: implemented only if the exposure to the borrower is fully extinguished

conditions: if in default as on the reference date
enriched_requirements.timeline: within 180 days from the end of Review Period
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In respect of accounts with aggregate exposure above a specified threshold with the
specified lenders on or after the 'reference date', resolution plan shall be
implemented within 180 days from the end of Review Period, which shall commence
not later than:
(1) the reference date, if in default as on the reference date;
enriched_requirements.object: days from the end of Review Period, which shall commence not later than: (1) the reference date

The reference dates for the purpose of paragraph 38 shall be as under:

Less than ₹1500 crore To be announced in due course
enriched_requirements.object: exposure of a borrower to specified lenders other than NBFC Reference date ₹2000 crore and above June 07, 2019 ₹1500 crore and

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In respect of accounts having aggregate exposure below ₹1,500 crore, the
requirements as laid down under Chapter IV of these Directions shall not apply.

conditions: Where a derivative contract is restructured
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Where a derivative contract is restructured, the following instructions shall apply:
<image>
(1) Any change in any of the parameters of the original contract would be
treated as a restructuring.
enriched_requirements.object: change in any of the parameters of the original contract would be treated as a restructuring

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The change in mark-to-market (MTM) value of the contract on the date of
restructuring should be cash settled.

(3) The restructuring of the derivative contract shall be carried out at prevalent
market rates, and not on the basis of off-market rates.
enriched_requirements.object: prevalent market rates, and not on the basis of off-market rates

conditions: If an AIFI partially or fully terminates a derivative contract before maturity
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If an AIFI partially or fully terminates a derivative contract before maturity, at their
discretion, based on preference of the clients to reduce the notional exposure of the
hedging derivative contract, such reduction in notional exposure shall not be treated
as restructuring of the derivative contract provided all other parameters of the
original contract remain unchanged.
enriched_requirements.object: of the derivative contract provided all other parameters of the original contract remain unchanged

conditions: if the MTM value of the derivative contract is not cash settled
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, if the MTM value of the derivative contract is not cash settled, an AIFI
may permit payment in instalments of the crystallized MTM of such derivative
contracts (including Forex Forward Contracts), subject to the following conditions:
(1) An AIFI shall permit repayment in instalments only if there is a reasonable
certainty of repayment by the client.
enriched_requirements.object: only if there is a reasonable certainty of repayment by the client

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The repayment period shall not extend beyond the maturity date of the
contract.
enriched_requirements.object: date of the contract

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The repayment instalments for the crystallized MTM shall be uniformly
received over the remaining maturity of the contract and its periodicity shall
be at least once in a quarter.
enriched_requirements.object: the remaining maturity of the contract and its periodicity shall be at least once in a quarter

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Where a viable resolution plan in respect of a borrower specified in paragraphs 36
and 37 is not implemented within the timelines given below, an AIFI having exposure
to the borrower shall make additional specific provisions as under:
Additional specific provisions to be
made as a per cent of total outstanding(fund based as well non-
Timeline for implementation of
viable RP
fund based), if RP not implemented
within the timeline 180 days from the end of Review Period 20 per cent
365 days from the commencement of Review Period
15 per cent (i.e.
enriched_requirements.object: as under: Additional specific provisions to be made as a per cent of total outstanding(fund based as well non- Timeline for implementation of viable RP fund based)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The additional specific provisions shall be made over and above the higher of the
following, subject to the total provisions held being capped at 100 per cent of total
outstanding:
(1) the provisions already held;
enriched_requirements.object: above the higher of the following

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The additional specific provisions shall also be required to be made in cases where
recovery proceedings have been initiated in respect of the borrower, unless the
recovery proceedings are fully completed.
enriched_requirements.object: be made in cases where recovery proceedings have been initiated in respect of the borrower

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The additional specific provisions specified in paragraph 44 may be reversed as
under:
(1) where the resolution plan involves only payment of overdues by the
borrower - the additional provisions may be reversed only if the borrower is
not in default for a period of six months from the date of clearing of the
overdues with all the specified lenders;
enriched_requirements.object: (1) where the resolution plan involves only payment of overdues by the borrower - the additional provisions may be reversed only

conditions:
where resolution plan involves restructuring / change in ownership outside
the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(2) where resolution plan involves restructuring / change in ownership outside
the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016 - the additional provisions may
be reversed upon implementation of the resolution plan;
enriched_requirements.object: of the resolution plan

conditions: where resolution is pursued under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) where resolution is pursued under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code,
2016 - half of the additional provisions made may be reversed on filing of
insolvency application and the remaining additional provisions may be
reversed upon admission of the borrower into the insolvency resolution
process under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016;
enriched_requirements.object: of insolvency application and the remaining additional provisions may be reversed upon admission of the borrower into the insolv
